movie.actors: Ben Affleck, Henry Cavill, Amy Adams, Jesse Eisenberg
movie.plot: Fearing that the actions of Superman are left unchecked, Batman takes on the Man of Steel, while the world wrestles with what kind of a hero it really needs.
movie.title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
movie.writer: Chris Terrio, David S. Goyer, Bob Kane (Batman created by), Bill Finger (Batman created by), Jerry Siegel (Superman created by), Joe Shuster (Superman created by), William Moulton Marston (character created by: Wonder Woman)
